expectations.evidence: Report header: 'Tool used: uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py formula'. Direct Formula section shows the formula was read from the model.

expectations.text: Returns a formula referencing EBIT_Y1 and Tax_Y1 (e.g., '=EBIT_Y1-Tax_Y1')
expectations.evidence: Direct Formula: 'Net_Income_Y1 = EBIT_Y1 - Tax_Y1'. Full Dependency Chain table: 'Net_Income_Y1: =EBIT_Y1-Tax_Y1, Type: Calculation'.

expectations.text: Explains the formula in plain English: Net Income = EBIT minus Tax
expectations.evidence: Plain-English Explanation: 'Net_Income_Y1 computes Year 1 net income after tax...6. Net Income = EBIT minus tax.'

expectations.text: Does NOT fabricate or guess the formula — reads it from the actual model file
expectations.evidence: Report states 'Tool used: uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py formula'. The Full Dependency Chain traces from the model's actual formulas through all levels back to inputs. The formula matches the model's known structure.
